description: Adversarial bypass: Edge Function extracts Authorization header (req.headers.get('Authorization')) but NEVER verifies the JWT — token is read into a variable, then completely ignored. Service-role-key DB call follows. JWT_VERIFY_PATTERNS at line 47 includes /req\.headers\.get\(\s*['"]Authorization['"]/  — mere extraction satisfies the pattern. Scanner mistakenly believes auth is enforced and fails to fire CRITICAL.
